content: (The location is now Kolbjorn Barrow.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Selena, Restless Draugr, Serana, Frea, Lydia)

Candance: This Kolbjorn Barrow feels like it's swallowing us whole in the pre-dawn chill—Selena's just ahead, but I hear those restless draugr stirring in the shadows. Norma: Aye, the cold bites deeper here on Solstheim than in Skyrim's heartlands.

(*You are observing the following:* The scene depicts a dimly lit, circular chamber carved from rough, weathered stone, with high arched walls curving inward to form a domed ceiling. Flickering torchlight from iron brackets mounted on the walls casts long shadows, illuminating intricate carvings of stern faces and abstract motifs etched into the stone blocks. The floor is uneven, strewn with debris, and centers on a raised circular platform accessed by short, blood-smeared steps. This platform is surrounded by dark pools of blood that have spread outward, soaking into the cracks of the stone. In the foreground and around the platform lie several lifeless human figures, clad in tattered robes, fur-trimmed garments, and simple tunics, their bodies sprawled in unnatural poses amid the gore. One figure near the steps wears dark, flowing robes with intricate embroidery, another in lighter attire with a hood partially fallen back. Weapons like swords and staffs are scattered nearby, some bloodied. The air seems heavy with the aftermath of violence, with no signs of movement or life beyond the subtle glow of the torches.)
(The location is now Kolbjorn Barrow.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Lydia, Frea, Restless Draugr, Hulking Draugr, Selena)

Serana: You know, these draugr are like my exes—ancient, undead, and always rising at the worst times. But hey, at least they don't text. Candance: This pre-dawn chill in the barrow cuts right through my Silver Witch robes... deeper than anything back in the Imperial heartlands. Selena, you sure leading us into these shadows is the play with all these restless ones stirring? Serana: Oh, Candance, shadows are my specialty—vampire perks. Besides, if we don't stir them, they'll just lie there dreaming of their glory days. Pass me that torch; I want a better look at this blood-soaked mess. Candance: Fine, but keep an eye on those hulking brutes further in. Wuuthrad's itching for a swing, and I've got Unstoppable Force ready if they charge. What do you make of all these tattered bodies, Serana?

(*You are observing the following:* The scene depicts a dimly lit cavern interior, viewed from a low perspective as if standing within it. The walls and ceiling are composed of rough, jagged rock formations in earthy brown and gray tones, with irregular cracks and protrusions creating a claustrophobic, natural enclosure. Warm, flickering orange light emanates from a small campfire or lantern positioned centrally on the uneven stone floor, casting long shadows and highlighting scattered debris like small rocks, bones, and patches of dirt. To the left and right, arched openings in the rock lead to deeper passages, shrouded in deeper darkness. The floor slopes gently upward toward the center, with faint glows suggesting additional light sources further in, evoking a sense of exploration in an ancient, foreboding underground space. At the bottom of the view, subtle overlays indicate status elements: horizontal bars in green, blue, and red, along with a compass-like directional indicator and small icons for inventory or abilities.) (Candance is now in combat!) (Serana is now in combat!) Candance: These draugr won't stay down—keep your guard up, Norma, they're swarming from the shadows! Norma: Aye, the cold's nothing compared to these cursed bones rising again. I'll crush that hulking brute before it reaches us!
Candance: These shadows from the torchlight make every corner a trap—watch for more draugr stirring in those crevices!
